title: Momentum Swarm Dispatch-Run (Per-Supervisor Saga Step)
description: Extension of the existing Phase 11 dispatch-run-NNN artifact for swarm-aware supervisors. Lives at <repo>/.momentum/runs/dispatch-run-NNN.json (one per supervisor per wave). The conductor never reads this directly — it watches HEAD SHAs + reads materialized board.json. This schema is the durable per-step saga record that makes /swarm resume possible.

run_id.description: Zero-padded counter per repo per primitive. Matches the filename suffix.

primitive.description: Marks this as a swarm supervisor run (distinct from scout/dispatch/handoff dispatch-runs that share the same .momentum/runs/ directory).

repo.description: Ecosystem member id this supervisor is pinned to.

step_n.description: Monotonic step counter inside this wave. Each supervisor /start-phase iteration bumps step_n.

done.description: True once /complete-phase succeeded in this supervisor's repo for this wave.

last_commit.description: Last commit subject the supervisor wrote.

current_file.description: Free-form: what file the supervisor is editing right now.

inbox_items.description: Slugs of inbox items this supervisor has written. Empty when none pending.

history_tail_offset.description: Byte offset into <repo>/specs/phases/<slug>/history.md where the supervisor was last seen. Lets /swarm resume seek to new entries without re-reading the full file.

claimed_by_session.description: Session UUID that wrote this step. Portability hook.
